passives.name: Turret Plating
passives.effects: Turrets have plating which provide them extra defensive measures against enemies. Attackers are rewarded for destroying portions of the plating.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: No explicit plating values, damage reduction, or reward values are present in the source text.
